de: Production plan could not be approved

de: Production plan could not be rejected

de: Search by plan no, main stock, or variant

en: Review the plan, orders, dependencies, and linked transfers in a management view.
de: Review the plan, orders, dependencies, and linked transfers in a management view.

en: This plan is still in draft. If it has not been processed on the floor, you can go back to edit mode and update it.
de: This plan is still in draft. If it has not been processed on the floor, you can go back to edit mode and update it.

en: This plan may already be in operational flow. For that reason this detail screen stays read-only and editing remains locked.
de: This plan may already be in operational flow. For that reason this detail screen stays read-only and editing remains locked.

en: Review order, quantity, assignment, and actual summary in one place.
de: Review order, quantity, assignment, and actual summary in one place.

en: Track output and consumption planned-vs-actual gaps for each order.
de: Track output and consumption planned-vs-actual gaps for each order.

en: Review production transfers linked to each order separately.
de: Review production transfers linked to each order separately.

en: You can view this plan, but you cannot switch to edit mode because you do not have production update permission.
de: You can view this plan, but you cannot switch to edit mode because you do not have production update permission.

en: There is no transfer linked to this order.
de: There is no transfer linked to this order.

en: There is no transfer linked to this plan.
de: There is no transfer linked to this plan.

en: You can start quickly from a work order or stock information, then complete the plan normally on this screen.
de: You can start quickly from a work order or stock information, then complete the plan normally on this screen.

en: Only draft plans with no shopfloor activity can be updated here.
de: Only draft plans with no shopfloor activity can be updated here.

en: Quick entry applied. Main product, variant, and quantity fields were filled.
de: Quick entry applied. Main product, variant, and quantity fields were filled.

en: Production plan could not be saved
de: Production plan could not be saved

en: This plan has already been saved and you are updating it here. When you save, the system updates the existing draft plan instead of creating a new one.
de: This plan has already been saved and you are updating it here. When you save, the system updates the existing draft plan instead of creating a new one.

en: An output row has no linked order.
de: An output row has no linked order.

en: A consumption row has no linked order.
de: A consumption row has no linked order.

en: Fill the basic fields from a work order or stock information, then complete the rest of the plan here.
de: Fill the basic fields from a work order or stock information, then complete the rest of the plan here.

en: You define every order, output, and consumption breakdown. ERP may still be used as reference.
de: You define every order, output, and consumption breakdown. ERP may still be used as reference.

en: If a work order already exists, enter it here. The system fills the main product, variant, and key planning fields in Step 1.
de: If a work order already exists, enter it here. The system fills the main product, variant, and key planning fields in Step 1.

en: If no work order exists yet, choose the main product, optional variant, and quantity. The system fills Step 1 based on stock information.
de: If no work order exists yet, choose the main product, optional variant, and quantity. The system fills Step 1 based on stock information.

en: Quick entry is only the start
de: Quick entry is only the start

en: The fetched information fills Step 1 and, when available, the initial plan draft. Final review and saving still happen on this screen.
de: The fetched information fills Step 1 and, when available, the initial plan draft. Final review and saving still happen on this screen.

en: See what is missing before you save the plan.
de: See what is missing before you save the plan.

en: Core fields look ready. Review details, then save.
de: Core fields look ready. Review details, then save.

en: These fields map to the production plan header (PR_HEADER).
de: These fields map to the production plan header (PR_HEADER).

en: Assign team, role, or primary owner at PR_HEADER_ASSIGNMENT level.
de: Assign team, role, or primary owner at PR_HEADER_ASSIGNMENT level.

en: Header assignments are optional but recommended to clarify shopfloor ownership.
de: Header assignments are optional but recommended to clarify shopfloor ownership.

en: Drag the handle on the left and drop on another card to update flow numbers and rebuild dependencies for the current execution mode. (No links in parallel mode.)
de: Drag the handle on the left and drop on another card to update flow numbers and rebuild dependencies for the current execution mode. (No links in parallel mode.)

en: Ne uretecegini ve kac adet olacagini belirle
de: Ne uretecegini ve kac adet olacagini belirle

en: Her asama icin ne uretilip ne tuketilecegini yaz
de: Her asama icin ne uretilip ne tuketilecegini yaz

en: Seri, paralel ve sorumlu dagilimini netlestir
de: Seri, paralel ve sorumlu dagilimini netlestir

en: Planlamacinin once urunu, sonra asamalari, en son akis ve sorumlulari kurmasi icin sade akisi takip edin.
de: Planlamacinin once urunu, sonra asamalari, en son akis ve sorumlulari kurmasi icin sade akisi takip edin.

en: Zorunlu alanlar dolu. Isterseniz bir sonraki adıma gecebilirsiniz.
de: Zorunlu alanlar dolu. Isterseniz bir sonraki adıma gecebilirsiniz.

en: Planin ana urununu, miktarini ve kaynagini secin.
de: Planin ana urununu, miktarini ve kaynagini secin.

en: Planin dogru kurulmasi icin ilk kontrol noktalari.
de: Planin dogru kurulmasi icin ilk kontrol noktalari.

en: Seri modda bir asama bitmeden sonraki asama baslamaz.
de: Seri modda bir asama bitmeden sonraki asama baslamaz.

en: Paralel modda asamalar ayni anda ilerleyebilir.
de: Paralel modda asamalar ayni anda ilerleyebilir.

en: Karma modda bazi asamalar ayni anda, bazi asamalar sirayla ilerler.
de: Karma modda bazi asamalar ayni anda, bazi asamalar sirayla ilerler.

en: Planlamaciya hiz kazandirmak icin hazir iskeletler sunuyoruz. Gerekirse sonra duzenlenir.
de: Planlamaciya hiz kazandirmak icin hazir iskeletler sunuyoruz. Gerekirse sonra duzenlenir.

en: Her kart tek bir uretim asamasidir. Planlamaci bu kartlari asama mantigiyla doldurur.
de: Her kart tek bir uretim asamasidir. Planlamaci bu kartlari asama mantigiyla doldurur.

en: Asamanin urunu, miktari ve akistaki yeri burada belirlenir.
de: Asamanin urunu, miktari ve akistaki yeri burada belirlenir.

en: Asama tipi secin, bu asamanin ne uretecegini yazin, sonra da once mi ayni anda mi yoksa sonra mi ilerleyecegini secin. Sistem teknik baglantiyi arka planda kurar.
de: Asama tipi secin, bu asamanin ne uretecegini yazin, sonra da once mi ayni anda mi yoksa sonra mi ilerleyecegini secin. Sistem teknik baglantiyi arka planda kurar.

en: Asama adi, uretilecek stok ve miktar tamam. Isterseniz bir sonraki asamaya gecebilirsiniz.
de: Asama adi, uretilecek stok ve miktar tamam. Isterseniz bir sonraki asamaya gecebilirsiniz.

en: Her asamanin ne uretecegini planlayin. Gerekirse ayni asamaya birden fazla cikti ekleyebilirsiniz.
de: Her asamanin ne uretecegini planlayin. Gerekirse ayni asamaya birden fazla cikti ekleyebilirsiniz.

en: Her asamanin ne tuketecegini planlayin. Gercekte kullanilan seri daha sonra operasyon sirasinda secilir.
de: Her asamanin ne tuketecegini planlayin. Gercekte kullanilan seri daha sonra operasyon sirasinda secilir.

en: Planlamaci asamalarin sirayla mi ayni anda mi ilerleyecegini burada kontrol eder. Sistem isterseniz baglantilari otomatik kurar.
de: Planlamaci asamalarin sirayla mi ayni anda mi ilerleyecegini burada kontrol eder. Sistem isterseniz baglantilari otomatik kurar.

en: Henuz asamalar arasi baglanti kurulmamıs. Seri veya karma planlarda otomatik akis kur butonunu kullanin.
de: Henuz asamalar arasi baglanti kurulmamıs. Seri veya karma planlarda otomatik akis kur butonunu kullanin.

en: Plani yonetecek ana ekip veya sorumluyu burada belirleyin.
de: Plani yonetecek ana ekip veya sorumluyu burada belirleyin.

en: Her asama farkli operatore veya role atanabilir.
de: Her asama farkli operatore veya role atanabilir.

en: Operator can start the order before dependencies complete.
de: Operator can start the order before dependencies complete.

en: Let ERP or shopfloor open the next step automatically.
de: Let ERP or shopfloor open the next step automatically.

en: No assignment rows for this order.
de: No assignment rows for this order.

en: PR_ORDER_OUTPUT defines what each order will produce.
de: PR_ORDER_OUTPUT defines what each order will produce.

en: PR_ORDER_CONSUMPTION lines; operators can enter actual serial/lot later.
de: PR_ORDER_CONSUMPTION lines; operators can enter actual serial/lot later.

en: No dependencies yet. Leave empty for parallel flow or link orders for serial flow.
de: No dependencies yet. Leave empty for parallel flow or link orders for serial flow.

en: You need production create permission to save this plan.
de: You need production create permission to save this plan.

en: You need production update permission to update this plan.
de: You need production update permission to update this plan.

en: Is emri no ile alanlari doldurun
de: Is emri no ile alanlari doldurun

en: Bu ekran once ana urunu ve miktari secmenizi, sonra uretimi asamalara bolmenizi, en son da hangi asamanin once veya ayni anda ilerleyecegini belirlemenizi saglar. Kayit aninda sistem plani uretim emirlerine cevirir.
de: Bu ekran once ana urunu ve miktari secmenizi, sonra uretimi asamalara bolmenizi, en son da hangi asamanin once veya ayni anda ilerleyecegini belirlemenizi saglar. Kayit aninda sistem plani uretim emirlerine cevirir.

en: Ana urun, planin sonunda elde etmek istediginiz mamuldur. Ana yapkod bu mamulun varyantini anlatir. Hazir bir is emri veya stok bilgisi varsa hizli giris ile bu alanlari otomatik doldurabilirsiniz.
de: Ana urun, planin sonunda elde etmek istediginiz mamuldur. Ana yapkod bu mamulun varyantini anlatir. Hazir bir is emri veya stok bilgisi varsa hizli giris ile bu alanlari otomatik doldurabilirsiniz.

en: Her kart tek bir uretim asamasidir. Ornek: govde hazirlama, montaj, paketleme. Seri modda bir asama bitmeden sonraki baslamaz. Paralel veya karma modda ayni sequence numarasina sahip asamalar birlikte ilerleyebilir.
de: Her kart tek bir uretim asamasidir. Ornek: govde hazirlama, montaj, paketleme. Seri modda bir asama bitmeden sonraki baslamaz. Paralel veya karma modda ayni sequence numarasina sahip asamalar birlikte ilerleyebilir.

en: Cikti, ilgili asama sonunda elde edilen urundur. Ara mamul olabilir, nihai mamul olabilir. Burada planlanan miktar yazilir; gercekte ne kadar uretildigi process ekraninda kaydedilir.
de: Cikti, ilgili asama sonunda elde edilen urundur. Ara mamul olabilir, nihai mamul olabilir. Burada planlanan miktar yazilir; gercekte ne kadar uretildigi process ekraninda kaydedilir.

en: Tuketim, bu asamayi tamamlamak icin gereken malzemedir. Planlama ekraninda neyin gerekli oldugu yazilir. Hangi seri veya lotun kullanildigi ise daha sonra operator tarafinda process ekraninda girilir veya ERP/Netsis tarafindan dogrulanir.
de: Tuketim, bu asamayi tamamlamak icin gereken malzemedir. Planlama ekraninda neyin gerekli oldugu yazilir. Hangi seri veya lotun kullanildigi ise daha sonra operator tarafinda process ekraninda girilir veya ERP/Netsis tarafindan dogrulanir.

en: Akis, hangi asamanin once bitecegini ve hangisinin onu bekleyecegini belirler. Bu alan sayesinde birlestirme veya son montaj gibi asamalar, gerekli onceki asamalar bitmeden baslatilmaz.
de: Akis, hangi asamanin once bitecegini ve hangisinin onu bekleyecegini belirler. Bu alan sayesinde birlestirme veya son montaj gibi asamalar, gerekli onceki asamalar bitmeden baslatilmaz.

en: Review the plan, start operations per order, and record actual consumption and output movements.
de: Review the plan, start operations per order, and record actual consumption and output movements.

de: Could not load production plan detail.

de: Follow start, pause, resume, and complete events in chronological order.

de: No operation events yet. Select an order and start an operation to see the timeline here.

de: Assignments, orders, outputs, and consumptions in one place.

de: e.g. order no. or stock code

de: No matching source cell for the selected order.

de: No matching target cell for the selected order.

de: You need production update permission to operate on this stage. Operation buttons stay disabled for that reason.

en: Once size atanmis bir asama secin. Tuketim kalemleri secilen asamadan otomatik gelir.
de: Once size atanmis bir asama secin. Tuketim kalemleri secilen asamadan otomatik gelir.

en: Makine durusu, ara veya bekleme icin kullanin.
de: Makine durusu, ara veya bekleme icin kullanin.

en: Duraklayan asamayi kaldigi yerden devam ettirir.
de: Duraklayan asamayi kaldigi yerden devam ettirir.

en: Bu asamadaki operasyonu kapatir ve durumu gunceller.
de: Bu asamadaki operasyonu kapatir ve durumu gunceller.

en: Bu kalem icin seri girmek zorunlu.
de: Bu kalem icin seri girmek zorunlu.

en: Once size atanmis bir asama secin. Uretilecek cikti kalemleri secilen asamadan otomatik gelir.
de: Once size atanmis bir asama secin. Uretilecek cikti kalemleri secilen asamadan otomatik gelir.

en: Girilen bilgi ile eslesen plan satiri bulunamadi.
de: Girilen bilgi ile eslesen plan satiri bulunamadi.

en: Plan satiri hizli kayit alanina tasindi.
de: Plan satiri hizli kayit alanina tasindi.

en: Kioskta tek ekrandan ilerlemek icin asamanin su anki gerekli adimlarini takip edin.
de: Kioskta tek ekrandan ilerlemek icin asamanin su anki gerekli adimlarini takip edin.

en: Stok kodu, yapkod veya barkod benzeri bir bilgi girin; sistem uygun plan satirini doldursun.
de: Stok kodu, yapkod veya barkod benzeri bir bilgi girin; sistem uygun plan satirini doldursun.

en: Secili asama icin zorunlu ve planli tuketim satirlarini seri/lokasyon bilgisiyle inceleyin.
de: Secili asama icin zorunlu ve planli tuketim satirlarini seri/lokasyon bilgisiyle inceleyin.

en: Secili asamanin hedef ciktilarini takip ve seri gereksinimleriyle izleyin.
de: Secili asamanin hedef ciktilarini takip ve seri gereksinimleriyle izleyin.

en: {{orderNo}} asamasinin malzeme besleme, yari mamul veya cikti tasima transferini tek tikla baslat.
de: {{orderNo}} asamasinin malzeme besleme, yari mamul veya cikti tasima transferini tek tikla baslat.

en: 1. Tuketim kalemini secin. 2. Miktari kontrol edin. 3. Gerekirse seri girip kaydedin.
de: 1. Tuketim kalemini secin. 2. Miktari kontrol edin. 3. Gerekirse seri girip kaydedin.

en: 1. Uretilecek cikti kalemini secin. 2. Miktari kontrol edin. 3. Gerekirse seri girip kaydedin.
de: 1. Uretilecek cikti kalemini secin. 2. Miktari kontrol edin. 3. Gerekirse seri girip kaydedin.

en: Only draft plans with no shopfloor activity can be edited. Processed plans stay locked to protect field activity.
de: Only draft plans with no shopfloor activity can be edited. Processed plans stay locked to protect field activity.

de: Search document no, main stock, or project

de: You need production update permission to edit this plan.

de: Size atanmis bekleyen uretim emri bulunamadi

de: Production transfer order could not be rejected

de: Search by document no, transfer purpose, or warehouse

en: No production transfer orders awaiting approval
de: No production transfer orders awaiting approval

en: Completed or processed transfer orders cannot be edited for safety. Clone the transfer if you need a new one.
de: Completed or processed transfer orders cannot be edited for safety. Clone the transfer if you need a new one.

en: Search document no or linked plan
de: Search document no or linked plan

en: You need production transfer update permission to edit this transfer.
de: You need production transfer update permission to edit this transfer.

en: Review the linked production plan, transfer purpose, and lines in one place.
de: Review the linked production plan, transfer purpose, and lines in one place.

en: This transfer is completed. For safety it is read-only; clone it if you need a new transfer.
de: This transfer is completed. For safety it is read-only; clone it if you need a new transfer.

en: This transfer is still open. If it has not been processed on the floor, you can switch to edit mode and update it.
de: This transfer is still open. If it has not been processed on the floor, you can switch to edit mode and update it.

en: See which plan or order need this transfer belongs to.
de: See which plan or order need this transfer belongs to.

en: Team note or work description entered for this transfer.
de: Team note or work description entered for this transfer.

en: Review which stocks move for which purpose, line by line.
de: Review which stocks move for which purpose, line by line.

en: There are no lines saved for this transfer.
de: There are no lines saved for this transfer.

en: You can view this transfer, but you cannot switch to edit mode because you do not have production transfer update permission.
de: You can view this transfer, but you cannot switch to edit mode because you do not have production transfer update permission.

en: You can update transfer orders here as long as they are not completed and have not been processed.
de: You can update transfer orders here as long as they are not completed and have not been processed.

en: You are creating a new transfer order based on an existing one.
de: You are creating a new transfer order based on an existing one.

en: Production transfer order saved as a clone
de: Production transfer order saved as a clone

en: Production transfer order could not be saved
de: Production transfer order could not be saved

en: This transfer has already been saved. Changes here update the current transfer order; they do not create a new copy.
de: This transfer has already been saved. Changes here update the current transfer order; they do not create a new copy.

en: This screen uses an existing transfer as a template. The document number must be new; saving will create a new transfer order.
de: This screen uses an existing transfer as a template. The document number must be new; saving will create a new transfer order.

en: No suggested lines were found for the selected plan or order.
de: No suggested lines were found for the selected plan or order.

en: Suggested transfer lines were prepared based on the production requirement.
de: Suggested transfer lines were prepared based on the production requirement.

en: The selected suggested lines were added to the current draft.
de: The selected suggested lines were added to the current draft.

en: The selected suggested lines replaced the current draft lines.
de: The selected suggested lines replaced the current draft lines.

en: You need production transfer create permission to save this transfer.
de: You need production transfer create permission to save this transfer.

en: You need production transfer update permission to update this transfer.
de: You need production transfer update permission to update this transfer.

en: The system suggests ready transfer lines based on the need in the selected plan or order.
de: The system suggests ready transfer lines based on the need in the selected plan or order.

en: First choose the required lines. Then either add them to the current draft or replace the current lines.
de: First choose the required lines. Then either add them to the current draft or replace the current lines.

en: There are no suggestions yet. Choose the plan/order and transfer purpose to load suggestions.
de: There are no suggestions yet. Choose the plan/order and transfer purpose to load suggestions.

en: Choose which production need this transfer serves.
de: Choose which production need this transfer serves.

en: Specify whether it is material supply, semi-finished movement, or finished goods output.
de: Specify whether it is material supply, semi-finished movement, or finished goods output.

en: Load suggestions and add the selected lines to the draft in a controlled way.
de: Load suggestions and add the selected lines to the draft in a controlled way.

en: Bu ekran PT tarafinda hangi rol ile neden acildigini netlestirir.
de: Bu ekran PT tarafinda hangi rol ile neden acildigini netlestirir.

en: Uretim tuketimi icin gerekli hammaddeleri besleme alanina cekmek icin kullanilir.
de: Uretim tuketimi icin gerekli hammaddeleri besleme alanina cekmek icin kullanilir.

en: Bir emrin ciktisini sonraki emrin tuketimine veya istasyonuna tasir.
de: Bir emrin ciktisini sonraki emrin tuketimine veya istasyonuna tasir.

en: Tamamlanan urunun uretimden mamul depoya cikisini yonetir.
de: Tamamlanan urunun uretimden mamul depoya cikisini yonetir.

en: Bu ekran, uretim planindaki bir asamaya malzeme beslemek, ara mamulu sonraki istasyona tasimak veya tamamlanan urunu mamul depoya almak icin transfer emri olusturur. Oneri paneli, secili plan veya emrin ihtiyacindan otomatik satir uretir.
de: Bu ekran, uretim planindaki bir asamaya malzeme beslemek, ara mamulu sonraki istasyona tasimak veya tamamlanan urunu mamul depoya almak icin transfer emri olusturur. Oneri paneli, secili plan veya emrin ihtiyacindan otomatik satir uretir.

en: Plan veya emir baglantisi kuruldugunda sistem, bu transferin hangi uretim ihtiyacini karşıladığını bilir. Boylece hangi tuketim satirinin beslendigi veya hangi ciktinin tasindigi izlenebilir olur.
de: Plan veya emir baglantisi kuruldugunda sistem, bu transferin hangi uretim ihtiyacini karşıladığını bilir. Boylece hangi tuketim satirinin beslendigi veya hangi ciktinin tasindigi izlenebilir olur.

en: Once onerileri getirerek sistemin uretim ihtiyacindan tavsiye uretmesini saglayin. Sonra gerekli satirlari secip mevcut taslaga ekleyin veya degistirin. Bu ekran planlamaciya malzeme besleme ve ara istasyon hareketlerini kontrollu kurdurmak icin tasarlandi.
de: Once onerileri getirerek sistemin uretim ihtiyacindan tavsiye uretmesini saglayin. Sonra gerekli satirlari secip mevcut taslaga ekleyin veya degistirin. Bu ekran planlamaciya malzeme besleme ve ara istasyon hareketlerini kontrollu kurdurmak icin tasarlandi.

en: Transferin hangi uretim plani veya emri icin acildigini belirtin.
de: Transferin hangi uretim plani veya emri icin acildigini belirtin.

en: Once onerileri getirerek emir listesini olusturun
de: Once onerileri getirerek emir listesini olusturun

en: Uretim tuketimlerini besleyen veya ciktisini tasiyan satirlari tanimlayin.
de: Uretim tuketimlerini besleyen veya ciktisini tasiyan satirlari tanimlayin.

en: Bu kalem {{orderNo}} emrine bagli ihtiyaci tasir.
de: Bu kalem {{orderNo}} emrine bagli ihtiyaci tasir.

en: Bu kalemin neyi, nereye ve hangi amacla tasiyacagini secin.
de: Bu kalemin neyi, nereye ve hangi amacla tasiyacagini secin.

en: Bu emre bagli onerili stok bulunmuyor
de: Bu emre bagli onerili stok bulunmuyor

en: Bu secim icin kaynak hucre onerisi yok
de: Bu secim icin kaynak hucre onerisi yok

en: Bu secim icin hedef hucre onerisi yok
de: Bu secim icin hedef hucre onerisi yok

en: Pick what will be counted, save the order, then enter quantities from the direct-entry screen.
de: Pick what will be counted, save the order, then enter quantities from the direct-entry screen.

en: Update document and scope details for a draft count order before lines are prepared.
de: Update document and scope details for a draft count order before lines are prepared.

en: Count order saved. Lines are ready, moving to direct entry now.
de: Count order saved. Lines are ready, moving to direct entry now.

en: Count order could not be saved.
de: Count order could not be saved.

en: You can view this page but you do not have permission to create a new count order.
de: You can view this page but you do not have permission to create a new count order.

en: The operator should first understand only the count type.
de: The operator should first understand only the count type.

en: Name the document, then choose the scope to be counted.
de: Name the document, then choose the scope to be counted.

en: These fields gain meaning based on the count type. The system ignores the fields you leave empty.
de: These fields gain meaning based on the count type. The system ignores the fields you leave empty.

en: If you want to combine warehouse, stock and rack in one order, add scope rows.
de: If you want to combine warehouse, stock and rack in one order, add scope rows.

en: See what the system will prepare before saving.
de: See what the system will prepare before saving.

en: You move to the direct-entry screen and save quantities.
de: You move to the direct-entry screen and save quantities.

en: Leave this on for the first opening count.
de: Leave this on for the first opening count.

en: Counts all active stock in one order. This is the easiest path for an opening count.
de: Counts all active stock in one order. This is the easiest path for an opening count.

en: Counts stocks in a single warehouse. Use it for warehouse-based counting.
de: Counts stocks in a single warehouse. Use it for warehouse-based counting.

en: Counts a specific stock code. Suitable for problematic or critical items.
de: Counts a specific stock code. Suitable for problematic or critical items.

en: Counts a specific rack area. Useful for rack cleanup and verification.
de: Counts a specific rack area. Useful for rack cleanup and verification.

en: Counts a single cell. This is the fastest local control method.
de: Counts a single cell. This is the fastest local control method.

en: Combines multiple warehouses, stocks, or racks in one count order.
de: Combines multiple warehouses, stocks, or racks in one count order.

en: A warehouse must be selected for warehouse count.
de: A warehouse must be selected for warehouse count.

en: A stock must be selected for stock count.
de: A stock must be selected for stock count.

en: A rack code must be entered for rack count.
de: A rack code must be entered for rack count.

en: A cell code must be entered for cell count.
de: A cell code must be entered for cell count.

en: At least one scope row must be added for combined count.
de: At least one scope row must be added for combined count.

en: At least one valid scope row must be filled for combined count.
de: At least one valid scope row must be filled for combined count.

en: All active stock will be included in the count list
de: All active stock will be included in the count list

en: Lines will be prepared automatically for the selected scope
de: Lines will be prepared automatically for the selected scope

en: There are no count orders yet.
de: There are no count orders yet.

en: Search by document no, warehouse or stock
de: Search by document no, warehouse or stock

en: There are no active count orders assigned to you.
de: There are no active count orders assigned to you.

en: Search by document no or count type
de: Search by document no or count type

en: Pick the order, pick the line, enter the quantity and save.
de: Pick the order, pick the line, enter the quantity and save.

en: Count screen could not be loaded
de: Count screen could not be loaded

en: You can view these counts but you do not have permission to enter counted quantities.
de: You can view these counts but you do not have permission to enter counted quantities.

en: Choose an assigned or active count order and continue with the lines below.
de: Choose an assigned or active count order and continue with the lines below.

en: The rule for the operator is simple: choose the line, enter what was counted, save it.
de: The rule for the operator is simple: choose the line, enter what was counted, save it.

en: Pick a count line first to enter a quantity.
de: Pick a count line first to enter a quantity.

en: Red rows mean there is a difference. The system may ask for a recount automatically.
de: Red rows mean there is a difference. The system may ask for a recount automatically.

en: There are no lines in this count order yet.
de: There are no lines in this count order yet.

en: Count entry could not be saved.
de: Count entry could not be saved.

en: Please choose a count line first.
de: Please choose a count line first.

en: Leave a short note if needed
de: Leave a short note if needed

en: List barcode templates, create a new design, edit existing templates, or jump directly to the label printing screen.
de: List barcode templates, create a new design, edit existing templates, or jump directly to the label printing screen.

en: Template-printer profile mapping could not be saved.
de: Template-printer profile mapping could not be saved.

en: No mapping exists for the selected template yet.
de: No mapping exists for the selected template yet.

en: Incoming stock is not defined for this case.
de: Incoming stock is not defined for this case.

en: Service case could not be saved.
de: Service case could not be saved.

en: Pick the customer record directly instead of typing an id; the system fills the customer code and identifier together.
de: Pick the customer record directly instead of typing an id; the system fills the customer code and identifier together.

en: The app may have moved to a newer version. Refresh the page and try again.
de: The app may have moved to a newer version. Refresh the page and try again.

en: Aşağıda bu grubun hangi modülleri görebileceğini, kayıt açabileceğini, güncelleyebileceğini veya silebileceğini seçersiniz. Bu gruba atanan tüm kullanıcılar aynı yetki setini alır.
de: Aşağıda bu grubun hangi modülleri görebileceğini, kayıt açabileceğini, güncelleyebileceğini veya silebileceğini seçersiniz. Bu gruba atanan tüm kullanıcılar aynı yetki setini alır.

en: Bu özet, grubun şu an hangi işlem tiplerinde yetki aldığını hızlıca görmenizi sağlar.
de: Bu özet, grubun şu an hangi işlem tiplerinde yetki aldığını hızlıca görmenizi sağlar.

en: Modül, işlem veya izin adı ara...
de: Modül, işlem veya izin adı ara...

en: Bu ekrani goruntuleyebilirsiniz ancak grup atamalarini guncellemek icin update yetkisi gerekir.
de: Bu ekrani goruntuleyebilirsiniz ancak grup atamalarini guncellemek icin update yetkisi gerekir.

en: Track differences between detail and summary balances.
de: Track differences between detail and summary balances.

en: Search warehouse, stock, yapkod or issue type...
de: Search warehouse, stock, yapkod or issue type...

en: Search warehouse, shelf, stock or serial...
de: Search warehouse, shelf, stock or serial...

en: No printable lines found for the selected document
de: No printable lines found for the selected document

en: No documents found for this operation.
de: No documents found for this operation.

en: No lines found for this document.
de: No lines found for this document.

en: This links the PPE card to a system user. First name and last name are filled from the selected user.
de: This links the PPE card to a system user. First name and last name are filled from the selected user.

en: Enter the internal personnel or registry code used to identify the employee.
de: Enter the internal personnel or registry code used to identify the employee.

en: Initial and 3-month entitlements are calculated from this date. A wrong date means a wrong entitlement result.
de: Initial and 3-month entitlements are calculated from this date. A wrong date means a wrong entitlement result.

en: Unique QR value scanned in the field to select the employee quickly.
de: Unique QR value scanned in the field to select the employee quickly.

en: The main key of this screen is the group code. Entitlement matching runs by group, not by stock code. Different stocks in the same group share the same rule; if a stock code exists, treat it as informational only.
de: The main key of this screen is the group code. Entitlement matching runs by group, not by stock code. Different stocks in the same group share the same rule; if a stock code exists, treat it as informational only.

en: Total quantity the employee can receive for this group when first joining.
de: Total quantity the employee can receive for this group when first joining.

en: Frequency controls whether the entitlement is taken all at once or in parts. If you enter 30, the employee must wait at least 30 days after one issue before another issue from the same entitlement. Leave empty if no day-gap rule is needed.
de: Frequency controls whether the entitlement is taken all at once or in parts. If you enter 30, the employee must wait at least 30 days after one issue before another issue from the same entitlement. Leave empty if no day-gap rule is needed.

en: When enabled, the employee may receive the full initial entitlement in one issue. When disabled, the system forces partial usage and applies the frequency-day rule if defined.
de: When enabled, the employee may receive the full initial entitlement in one issue. When disabled, the system forces partial usage and applies the frequency-day rule if defined.

en: Maximum quantity allowed in one issue or in each frequency window. Example: if total entitlement is 3 and frequency quantity is 1, the employee can receive at most 1 item each time.
de: Maximum quantity allowed in one issue or in each frequency window. Example: if total entitlement is 3 and frequency quantity is 1, the employee can receive at most 1 item each time.

en: Extra entitlement that becomes available 3 months after employment start.
de: Extra entitlement that becomes available 3 months after employment start.

en: If the 3-month entitlement will be used in parts, this defines how many days must pass between issues.
de: If the 3-month entitlement will be used in parts, this defines how many days must pass between issues.

en: When enabled, the full 3-month entitlement can be taken in one issue. Otherwise the system allows only partial usage.
de: When enabled, the full 3-month entitlement can be taken in one issue. Otherwise the system allows only partial usage.

en: If the 3-month entitlement is used in parts, this defines the maximum quantity per issue.
de: If the 3-month entitlement is used in parts, this defines the maximum quantity per issue.

en: Standard quantity granted again in every recurring period after the initial and 3-month phases are completed.
de: Standard quantity granted again in every recurring period after the initial and 3-month phases are completed.

en: Defines the time unit used to renew the recurring entitlement. Usually day, month, or year.
de: Defines the time unit used to renew the recurring entitlement. Usually day, month, or year.

en: Defines how often the recurring entitlement renews. Example: year + 1 means every year; day + 30 means every 30 days.
de: Defines how often the recurring entitlement renews. Example: year + 1 means every year; day + 30 means every 30 days.

en: If the recurring entitlement is used in parts, this defines how many days must pass between issues.
de: If the recurring entitlement is used in parts, this defines how many days must pass between issues.

en: When enabled, the full recurring entitlement can be taken in one issue. Otherwise the system enforces partial usage.
de: When enabled, the full recurring entitlement can be taken in one issue. Otherwise the system enforces partial usage.

en: If recurring entitlement is used in parts, this defines the maximum quantity per issue.
de: If recurring entitlement is used in parts, this defines the maximum quantity per issue.

en: Inactive rows are ignored by entitlement calculation.
de: Inactive rows are ignored by entitlement calculation.

en: Enable this if the group is mandatory for occupational safety; it can be used in controls and reporting.
de: Enable this if the group is mandatory for occupational safety; it can be used in controls and reporting.

en: Initial wait days before next issue
de: Initial wait days before next issue

en: 3rd month wait days before next issue
de: 3rd month wait days before next issue

en: Routine wait days before next issue
de: Routine wait days before next issue

en: Select a group from initial rights
de: Select a group from initial rights

en: No PPE employee record for this user
de: No PPE employee record for this user

en: Employee and at least one line are required
de: Employee and at least one line are required

en: This screen shows remaining entitlements before QR/barcode flow. It uses the same entitlement API as distribution; results match operations.
de: This screen shows remaining entitlements before QR/barcode flow. It uses the same entitlement API as distribution; results match operations.

en: Run a check with employee, group, and quantity to see results here.
de: Run a check with employee, group, and quantity to see results here.

en: Employee, warehouse, and lines are required.
de: Employee, warehouse, and lines are required.

en: Select employee from list instead of QR
de: Select employee from list instead of QR

en: Group entitlements for the job appear after an employee is selected.
de: Group entitlements for the job appear after an employee is selected.

en: No active group entitlement for this person.
de: No active group entitlement for this person.

en: Open orders matching the employee’s customer are listed after you pick an employee.
de: Open orders matching the employee’s customer are listed after you pick an employee.

en: No pending open PPE order for this customer.
de: No pending open PPE order for this customer.

en: The scanned stock is on an open PPE order for the customer and quantity is within limit.
de: The scanned stock is on an open PPE order for the customer and quantity is within limit.

en: Quantity exceeds the open order pending amount. You can take at most {{max}}.
de: Quantity exceeds the open order pending amount. You can take at most {{max}}.

en: This stock exists on an open order, but the selected warehouse does not match the order warehouse.
de: This stock exists on an open order, but the selected warehouse does not match the order warehouse.

en: This stock is not on open PPE orders for the customer.
de: This stock is not on open PPE orders for the customer.

en: Entitlements in this group: initial {{a}}, 3M {{b}}, routine {{c}}, total {{total}}.
de: Entitlements in this group: initial {{a}}, 3M {{b}}, routine {{c}}, total {{total}}.

en: Resolve the barcode and stock before adding a line.
de: Resolve the barcode and stock before adding a line.

en: The open-order warehouse for this stock does not match the selected warehouse.
de: The open-order warehouse for this stock does not match the selected warehouse.

en: This stock does not exist on an open PPE order for the selected warehouse.
de: This stock does not exist on an open PPE order for the selected warehouse.

en: Quantity exceeds the open order amount for the selected warehouse. Max: {{max}}.
de: Quantity exceeds the open order amount for the selected warehouse. Max: {{max}}.

en: Waiting for entitlement result. Try again after barcode resolution completes.
de: Waiting for entitlement result. Try again after barcode resolution completes.

en: This stock cannot be added under the current entitlement and open-order rules.
de: This stock cannot be added under the current entitlement and open-order rules.

en: This stock code is written to the line as entered: {{code}}
de: This stock code is written to the line as entered: {{code}}

en: This line can be issued because the customer has an open PPE order even though no entitlement is available.
de: This line can be issued because the customer has an open PPE order even though no entitlement is available.

en: Entitlements in this group: initial {{a}}, 3M {{b}}, routine {{c}}, total {{total}}.
de: Entitlements in this group: initial {{a}}, 3M {{b}}, routine {{c}}, total {{total}}.

en: Issued only because of the customer's open PPE order.
de: Issued only because of the customer's open PPE order.

en: Has the initial entry order been opened?
de: Has the initial entry order been opened?

en: This employee still has initial-entry entitlement. If the initial-entry order has not been opened yet, continue in the initial order screen first.
de: This employee still has initial-entry entitlement. If the initial-entry order has not been opened yet, continue in the initial order screen first.

en: Search employee, stock, group, or error code
de: Search employee, stock, group, or error code

en: This screen defines entitlements by group code; stock code is not the main decision field here. The employee first uses the initial entitlement, then the 3-month entitlement, and afterwards the recurring entitlement.
de: This screen defines entitlements by group code; stock code is not the main decision field here. The employee first uses the initial entitlement, then the 3-month entitlement, and afterwards the recurring entitlement.

en: Very simple explanation for tablet and phone users
de: Very simple explanation for tablet and phone users

en: Total entitlement means how many items this person can receive in that phase overall.
de: Total entitlement means how many items this person can receive in that phase overall.

en: Wait days before next issue means how many days the person must wait after taking one item before taking again.
de: Wait days before next issue means how many days the person must wait after taking one item before taking again.

en: Max quantity per issue means how many items can be given in one visit at most.
de: Max quantity per issue means how many items can be given in one visit at most.

en: Initial wait days before next issue
de: Initial wait days before next issue

en: Routine wait days before next issue
de: Routine wait days before next issue

en: Example: if you enter 30, someone who receives today must wait 30 days before taking from the same entitlement again.
de: Example: if you enter 30, someone who receives today must wait 30 days before taking from the same entitlement again.

en: Example: if you enter 1, the user can receive at most 1 item in one visit.
de: Example: if you enter 1, the user can receive at most 1 item in one visit.

en: Enter how many days must pass between issues for the 3-month entitlement.
de: Enter how many days must pass between issues for the 3-month entitlement.

en: Enter the highest quantity that can be issued in one visit for the 3-month entitlement.
de: Enter the highest quantity that can be issued in one visit for the 3-month entitlement.

en: Enter how many days must pass before the recurring entitlement can be issued again.
de: Enter how many days must pass before the recurring entitlement can be issued again.

en: Enter the highest quantity that can be issued in one visit for the recurring entitlement.
de: Enter the highest quantity that can be issued in one visit for the recurring entitlement.

en: Pick employee, scan product, complete document.
de: Pick employee, scan product, complete document.

en: Quickly verify if employee has entitlement.
de: Quickly verify if employee has entitlement.

en: Manual override is granted if needed.
de: Manual override is granted if needed.

en: Document and remaining entitlement are monitored.
de: Document and remaining entitlement are monitored.

en: Entitlement rules for department and role.
de: Entitlement rules for department and role.

en: Additional entitlement for exceptional employee needs.
de: Additional entitlement for exceptional employee needs.

en: Search by document no, customer, employee or status
de: Search by document no, customer, employee or status

en: Lines are shown here when a document is selected.
de: Lines are shown here when a document is selected.

en: Place invoiced sheets to a yard or cell. Stack order is required for stacked storage.
de: Place invoiced sheets to a yard or cell. Stack order is required for stacked storage.

en: Select warehouse and shelf or yard code to open the view
de: Select warehouse and shelf or yard code to open the view

en: No other plates at this location.
de: No other plates at this location.

en: Places on the same row at the next free position to the right of the current plate. Suitable for side-by-side layouts.
de: Places on the same row at the next free position to the right of the current plate. Suitable for side-by-side layouts.

en: Moves one row deeper in the same column logic. Use for deep yard placement scenarios.
de: Moves one row deeper in the same column logic. Use for deep yard placement scenarios.

en: Stacks on top of the same position. System suggests the next stack order automatically.
de: Stacks on top of the same position. System suggests the next stack order automatically.

en: Suggest position beside, behind, or above existing plates with one click.
de: Suggest position beside, behind, or above existing plates with one click.

en: No placed plate exists in this location yet. For the first plate, enter row/position manually or check empty areas in 2D/3D view.
de: No placed plate exists in this location yet. For the first plate, enter row/position manually or check empty areas in 2D/3D view.

en: Search D-Code, stock, serial, or supplier
de: Search D-Code, stock, serial, or supplier

en: No lines available for the receipt.
de: No lines available for the receipt.

en: No local purchase receipt created yet.
de: No local purchase receipt created yet.

en: Search by plate or serial, then record arrived/approved/rejected and partial acceptance.
de: Search by plate or serial, then record arrived/approved/rejected and partial acceptance.

en: No matching record for this search.
de: No matching record for this search.

en: If the plate arrived and is suitable in quality/documents, approve it. Only approved quantity proceeds to the next step.
de: If the plate arrived and is suitable in quality/documents, approve it. Only approved quantity proceeds to the next step.

en: If plate arrived but is not suitable, reject it. Rejection reason is mandatory when rejected quantity exists.
de: If plate arrived but is not suitable, reject it. Rejection reason is mandatory when rejected quantity exists.

en: If the plate did not arrive, mark as missing. For partial arrivals, record arrived, approved and rejected quantities separately.
de: If the plate did not arrive, mark as missing. For partial arrivals, record arrived, approved and rejected quantities separately.

en: Enter excel record no or export ref no
de: Enter excel record no or export ref no

en: Filter by status, then pick the series to inspect.
de: Filter by status, then pick the series to inspect.

en: No series match this filter. Try another status or adjust your search.
de: No series match this filter. Try another status or adjust your search.

en: First select the relevant Excel batch, then select the plate series you want to inspect.
de: First select the relevant Excel batch, then select the plate series you want to inspect.

en: Track expected plate lines from Excel import by D-Code, order, and serial.
de: Track expected plate lines from Excel import by D-Code, order, and serial.

en: Search D-Code, stock, serial, or order no.
de: Search D-Code, stock, serial, or order no.

en: Upload the supplier list, run preview, and import with D-Code protection.
de: Upload the supplier list, run preview, and import with D-Code protection.
